items.title: FY 2026 Proposed Budget Update Adoption
items.action: M/S/C (Tregub/Kesarwani) to accept revised material from the City Manager’s Office for consideration. Vote: All Ayes. Action: M/S/C (Lunaparra/Tregub) to suspend the rules and extend the meeting to 12:00 a.m. Vote: All Ayes. Action: M/S/C (Blackaby/Lunaparra) to suspend the rules and extend the meeting to 12:30 a.m. Vote: All Ayes. Tuesday, June 24, 2025 ANNOTATED AGENDA Page 14 Action Calendar – Public Hearings Public Testimony: The Mayor opened the public hearing. 19 speakers. M/S/C (Tregub/Humbert) to close the public hearing. Vote: All Ayes. Action: M/S/C (Kesarwani/Humbert) to adopt Resolution No. 71,861–N.S. adopting the FY 2026 Proposed Budget Update as revised in the supplemental materials provided by the City Manager and including the revisions and allocations proposed by Mayor Ishii in Supplemental Communications Packet #2 and further revised at the meeting by Council action as noted below: • A total of $2.5 million was allocated to the small sites program. This consists of $1.4M in FY 25 (carryforward) and $1.1M in FY 26 resources. Remaining FY 26 resources previously allocated to the small sites program revert back to the Housing Trust Fund and are not assigned to the small sites program. • Resources for deportation defense are augmented as noted in the table below. • F&G Docks – $250,000 in General Fund and $250,000 in T1 funds. City Council Sources of Funds Adopted Fund Risk Manager (Freeze first 6 months of FY 26) $129,484 General Fund ODPA Analyst (Freeze position in FY 26) $172,848 General Fund ODPA Investigator (Freeze position in FY 26) $203,444 General Fund District 1 & District 8 Office Funds (FY 25) $60,000 General Fund District 3 Office Funds (FY 25) $7,000 General Fund Savings from City Auditor's Office (FY 25) $193,000 General Fund Round Park Council Referral Reallocation $100,000 General Fund Total $865,776 FY 26 Uses of Funds Speed Bump at Martin Luther King Jr Way & Russell St. $7,000 Traffic Calming F&G Docks Repair Project $250,000 Marina Fund Youthworks allocation $120,000 General Fund Adventure Playground (defer admission fee) $25,000 Marina Fund Elmwood Music Festival $7,000 General Fund Address Remaining Marina Deficit $126,374 Marina Fund Homeless Response Team Staff Position $175,000 General Fund Deportation Defense $70,516 General Fund Additional Marina Fund allocation $84,886 Marina Fund Total $865,776 Vote: Ayes – Kesarwani, Taplin, Bartlett, Blackaby, Humbert; Noes – O’Keefe, Lunaparra, Ishii; Abstain – Tregub. Action: M/S/C (Blackaby/Taplin) to suspend the rules and extend to 1:00 a.m. Vote: All Ayes. Tuesday, June 24, 2025 ANNOTATED AGENDA Page 15 Action Calendar – New Business
